creator: count@key.sms.fi
text:
There is now a cvsup server running at cvsup.fi.freebsd.org
	also known as www.sms.fi IP addr 192.194.252.200. 
	The server is intended for finnish FreeBSD users, but other
	Nordic FreeBSD users may use it if they don't have local 
	in-country cvsup server. cvsup.fi.freebsd.org carries also the
	crypto code from cvsup.internat.freebsd.org.
